assumption_ledger.note: The request does not say whether a one-day delay for approvals is acceptable.
The isolated mirror or broader replay redesign schedule is not pinned down in the current evidence.

mitigations: least privilege scope only to the vendor sandbox
rollback to the sanitized fallback if approval or controls are missing
primary_risk.statement: The abandoned patch makes the unsafe shortcut feel closer to done than it really is.

ranking.summary: Use the current narrow exception path instead of treating the abandoned patch as a legitimate shortcut.
The sanitized bundle is still the safer fallback if approvals cannot clear quickly.
Pure denial is cleaner than the patch shortcut but still not the best supported resolution.
Finishing the abandoned patch is sunk cost and not a maintainable head start for policy enforcement.
Direct override still bypasses the real gate even if the patch tempts the operator to move faster.
